title: Banking sector sensitivity
content: Private banks in India are often sensitive to RBI policy rate changes, credit growth trends, and net interest margin compression risks.

title: IT services earnings drivers
content: Indian IT companies are influenced by US demand trends, deal wins, attrition changes, and margin guidance commentary.

title: Valuation interpretation
content: P/E should be interpreted with growth durability, return on capital, and sector cycle context instead of in isolation.

title: Portfolio risk basics
content: Concentration in a single sector increases drawdown risk; diversification across sectors and market caps can reduce volatility.
